rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when referring to component ports
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings like assignments
Use `assign` only for existing output features or auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Use visible feature names in assumptions and guarantees
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations in assumptions and guarantees
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Use implementation-level assignments to bind subcomponent outputs when needed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
